subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #030 Adam and Eve
subcodes.first_line: It is recorded in the Torah that God placed Adam in the garden of Eden to work and tend it, and said to Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: در تورات مذکور که خداوند آدم را در جنت عدن نهاد تا عامل و حافظ باشد و فرمود
